NYX
Login
2.6.2 • E2EE Encrypted • Anonymous

PRIVATE
CONVERSATIONS
SECURED BY YOU

NYX is a zero-knowledge messaging application designed for absolute privacy. It utilizes the Signal Protocol (Double Ratchet) for end-to-end encryption and Argon2id for client-side identity hashing, allowing secure communication without requiring a phone number or email address.

End-to-end encrypted messaging with a tactile, industrial design. No phone numbers. No trackers. Just you and your data.

GET STARTED SOURCE CODE

WHY NYX?

Tired of complicated sign-ups and mandatory app downloads? NYX is your solution. Access it instantly from your favorite browser—no installation needed.

Worried about your data? We are too. NYX is built on a foundation of privacy, acting only as a secure bridge between you and your contacts.

NYX vs. THE GIANTS

Feature WhatsApp Telegram NYX

Yes

SQL Database

Supported by NYX: ZERO (Browser)

FEATURES BUILT FOR PRIVACY

NO PHONE NUMBER

Sign up with just a Username. Your real identity stays safe. No one can 'save your contact' without permission.

GHOST APP (PWA)

Zero install. Open in browser, chat, close tab, and clear data. Zero forensic footprint left on your device.

ARGON2 SECURITY

The only web chat that turns your password into a military-grade encryption key using memory-hardened hashing.

TACTILE DESIGN

A mutated neumorphic interface with chiseled depth and grain texture for a premium physical feel.

SIMPLE, SECURE, TRANSPARENT.

1. CREATE ACCOUNT

Sign up via username. We automatically generate your 24-word recovery phrase for encryption.

2. START CHATTING

Your messages are end-to-end encrypted from the very first word using the Signal Protocol.

3. VANISH

Done? Close the browser. Encryption keys are wiped from memory. No trace left behind.

TRUSTED BY PRIVACY ADVOCATES

"Finally, a chat app that respects my privacy without sacrificing a beautiful user experience. The fact that I control my own keys is a game-changer."

Yosep.

Privacy Advocate

"Nyx has become essential for our team. It's simple, secure, and a pleasure to use every day."

Sarah T.

Remote Team Lead

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

Is NYX end-to-end encrypted?
Yes. We use the Signal Protocol (X3DH + Double Ratchet Algorithm) to ensure that only you and the person you're communicating with can read what's sent. Not even the server can decrypt your messages.
Do I need to install an app?
No. NYX is a Progressive Web App (PWA). You can use it directly in your browser or install it to your home screen for a native-like experience without the app store friction.
Is it completely free?
Yes, NYX is open-source and free to use. There are no hidden fees, ads, or data tracking.
How do I recover my account?
When you sign up, you receive a 24-word recovery phrase. This is the ONLY way to restore your account, but remember that you cannot access your messages history. And we do not store this phrase.

TAKE BACK YOUR PRIVACY.

Don't let your data become a commodity. Switch to NYX today. Free, Open Source, Forever.

CREATE ANONYMOUS ACCOUNT
